label: Mutant
description: Defines an Anomaly mutant form (e.g., ghoul, shambler, awoken corpse).

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: HediffDef that marks a pawn as this mutant form. Applied on transformation and removed on reversion.

thinkTree.label: Think tree
thinkTree.description: ThinkTreeDef driving pawn AI in normal circumstances while in this mutant form.

thinkTreeConstant.label: Think tree (constant)
thinkTreeConstant.description: ThinkTreeDef evaluated every tick for constant-interval AI decisions.

allowedDevelopmentalStages.label: Allowed developmental stages
allowedDevelopmentalStages.description: Life stages a pawn can occupy while in this mutant form. Flags separated by commas. Default: Baby, Child, Adult.

clearMutantStatusOnDeath.label: Clear mutant status on death
clearMutantStatusOnDeath.description: If true, the mutant hediff is removed when the pawn dies.

consideredSubhuman.label: Considered subhuman
consideredSubhuman.description: If true, the pawn is treated as non-sapient for colonist-related mechanics.

workDisables.label: Work disables
workDisables.description: WorkTags this mutant cannot perform. Each flag is a separate li element.

disablesIdeo.label: Disables ideo
disablesIdeo.description: If true, the pawn's ideology is suppressed while in this mutant form.

disableAging.label: Disable aging
disableAging.description: If true, biological aging is paused while the pawn is in this mutant form.

disableApparel.label: Disable apparel
disableApparel.description: If true, the pawn cannot wear apparel while in this mutant form.

disablesGenes.label: Disables genes
disablesGenes.description: Genes that are suppressed while the pawn is in this mutant form.

preventsMentalBreaks.label: Prevents mental breaks
preventsMentalBreaks.description: If true, this mutant form blocks all mental breaks.

canOpenDoors.label: Can open doors
canOpenDoors.description: If true, the pawn can open owned-faction doors while in this mutant form.

canOpenAnyDoor.label: Can open any door
canOpenAnyDoor.description: If true, the pawn can open any door regardless of faction while in this mutant form.

canCarryPawns.label: Can carry pawns
canCarryPawns.description: If true, this mutant can carry downed pawns.

canTend.label: Can tend
canTend.description: If true, this mutant can tend to injured pawns.

canTravelInCaravan.label: Can travel in caravan
canTravelInCaravan.description: If true, this mutant can be included in caravans.

respectsAllowedArea.label: Respects allowed area
respectsAllowedArea.description: If true, this mutant obeys the pawn's allowed area restriction.

canGainXP.label: Can gain XP
canGainXP.description: If true, this mutant gains skill XP from activities.

disableEatingAtTable.label: Disable eating at table
disableEatingAtTable.description: If true, this mutant will not seek a table when eating.

disableOwnership.label: Disable ownership
disableOwnership.description: If true, this mutant cannot own items, beds, or slaves.

disablePolicies.label: Disable policies
disablePolicies.description: If true, drug and other policies do not apply to this mutant.

disableTitles.label: Disable titles
disableTitles.description: If true, royal titles are not applicable to this mutant.

disableFlying.label: Disable flying
disableFlying.description: If true, this mutant cannot fly even if it otherwise could.

namePrefix.label: Name prefix
namePrefix.description: Localized text prepended to the pawn's name label while in this mutant form.

hideLabel.label: Hide label
hideLabel.description: If true, the pawn's name label is hidden while in this mutant form.

codexEntry.label: Codex entry
codexEntry.description: EntityCodexEntryDef providing anomaly codex information for this mutant.

showInScenarioEditor.label: Show in scenario editor
showInScenarioEditor.description: If true, this mutant type appears as an option in the scenario editor.

overrideLabel.label: Override label
overrideLabel.description: Localized text that replaces the pawn's usual label while in this mutant form.

overrideInspectString.label: Override inspect string
overrideInspectString.description: Localized text that replaces the pawn's inspect tab description while in this mutant form.

showJobReport.label: Show job report
showJobReport.description: If true, the current job is shown in the inspect tab for this mutant.

whitelistedFloatMenuProviders.label: Whitelisted float menu providers
whitelistedFloatMenuProviders.description: C# types allowed to add float menu options for this mutant. Empty list means none are allowed; omitting this field means all providers are allowed.

disableNeeds.label: Disable needs
disableNeeds.description: If true, all needs are disabled for this mutant unless listed in needWhitelist.

needWhitelist.label: Need whitelist
needWhitelist.description: NeedDefs that remain active when disableNeeds is true.

overrideFoodType.label: Override food type
overrideFoodType.description: If true, the foodType field overrides the pawn's default diet preferences.

foodType.label: Food type
foodType.description: Diet restrictions when overrideFoodType is true. Named combined flag value from FoodTypeFlags.

allowEatingCorpses.label: Allow eating corpses
allowEatingCorpses.description: If true, this mutant can eat raw corpses as a food source.

useCorpseGraphics.label: Use corpse graphics
useCorpseGraphics.description: If true, the corpse's graphic is used for this mutant's appearance.

skinColorOverride.label: Skin color override
skinColorOverride.description: Fully overrides the pawn's skin color. Null means no override.

skinColorTint.label: Skin color tint
skinColorTint.description: Color multiplied on top of the pawn's natural skin color.

skinColorTintStrength.label: Skin color tint strength
skinColorTintStrength.description: How strongly the skinColorTint is blended in (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint).

hairColorOverride.label: Hair color override
hairColorOverride.description: Fully overrides the pawn's hair color. Null means no override.

bodyTypeGraphicPaths.label: Body type graphic paths
bodyTypeGraphicPaths.description: Per-body-type texture paths for this mutant form. Child tag name is the BodyTypeDef defName (e.g. Male, Female, Hulk, Fat, Thin); value is the texture asset path.

forcedHeadTypes.label: Forced head types
forcedHeadTypes.description: Pool of HeadTypeDefs randomly assigned to this mutant. Overrides normal head-type selection.

hairTagFilter.label: Hair tag filter
hairTagFilter.description: Restricts which hair styles this mutant can have.

beardTagFilter.label: Beard tag filter
beardTagFilter.description: Restricts which beard styles this mutant can have.

renderNodeProperties.label: Render node properties
renderNodeProperties.description: List of render graph node definitions controlling how this mutant's body parts and overlays are drawn. Use the Class attribute on each li to select a subclass.

standingAnimation.label: Standing animation
standingAnimation.description: AnimationDef played when this mutant is standing idle.

makesFootprints.label: Makes footprints
makesFootprints.description: If true, this mutant leaves footprint decals when walking.

canBleed.label: Can bleed
canBleed.description: If true, this mutant bleeds and leaves blood when wounded.

bloodDef.label: Blood def
bloodDef.description: ThingDef used as the blood filth spawned when this mutant bleeds.

bloodSmearDef.label: Blood smear def
bloodSmearDef.description: ThingDef used as the blood smear decal left by this mutant.

entitledToMedicalCare.label: Entitled to medical care
entitledToMedicalCare.description: If true, colonists will tend this mutant's wounds.

isImmuneToInfections.label: Immune to infections
isImmuneToInfections.description: If true, this mutant cannot contract infections from wounds.

canUseDrugs.label: Can use drugs
canUseDrugs.description: If true, this mutant can use drugs. When false, only drugs listed in drugWhitelist are permitted.

drugWhitelist.label: Drug whitelist
drugWhitelist.description: ThingDefs of drugs this mutant is permitted to use when canUseDrugs is false.

woundColor.label: Wound color
woundColor.description: Color used for wound graphics on this mutant. Null uses the default wound color.

preventIllnesses.label: Prevent illnesses
preventIllnesses.description: If true, this mutant cannot contract illnesses.

removeChronicIllnesses.label: Remove chronic illnesses
removeChronicIllnesses.description: If true, chronic illnesses are removed when the pawn enters this mutant form.

removePermanentInjuries.label: Remove permanent injuries
removePermanentInjuries.description: If true, permanent injuries are removed when the pawn enters this mutant form.

removeAddictions.label: Remove addictions
removeAddictions.description: If true, addictions are removed when the pawn enters this mutant form.

removeAllInjuries.label: Remove all injuries
removeAllInjuries.description: If true, all injuries are healed when the pawn enters this mutant form.

restoreLegs.label: Restore legs
restoreLegs.description: If true, missing legs are restored when the pawn enters this mutant form.

terminatePregnancy.label: Terminate pregnancy
terminatePregnancy.description: If true, any active pregnancy is terminated when the pawn enters this mutant form.

partsCleanAndDroppable.label: Parts clean and droppable
partsCleanAndDroppable.description: If true, worn apparel and equipment is cleanly removed when the pawn transforms.

clearsEgo.label: Clears ego
clearsEgo.description: If true, the pawn's ego (identity) is wiped when it enters this mutant form.

breathesAir.label: Breathes air
breathesAir.description: If true, this mutant requires breathable air to survive.

givesHediffs.label: Gives hediffs
givesHediffs.description: Hediffs applied to the pawn when it becomes this mutant.

removesHediffs.label: Removes hediffs
removesHediffs.description: HediffDefs removed from the pawn when it becomes this mutant.

hediffGivers.label: Hediff givers
hediffGivers.description: Dynamic hediff givers that can apply hediffs to this mutant pawn over time.

deathLetter.label: Death letter
deathLetter.description: Localized letter title sent when this mutant dies.

deathLetterExtra.label: Death letter extra
deathLetterExtra.description: Additional localized text appended to the death letter body.

soundCall.label: Sound call
soundCall.description: SoundDef played when this mutant calls out.

soundAttack.label: Sound attack
soundAttack.description: SoundDef played when this mutant makes a melee attack.

soundWounded.label: Sound wounded
soundWounded.description: SoundDef played when this mutant is wounded.

soundDeath.label: Sound death
soundDeath.description: SoundDef played when this mutant dies.

soundAngry.label: Sound angry
soundAngry.description: SoundDef played when this mutant is agitated or aggravated.

soundAttackChance.label: Sound attack chance
soundAttackChance.description: Probability (0-1) that the attack sound plays on each melee swing. -1 means the sound always plays.

verbs.label: Verbs
verbs.description: Attack verb modes for ranged or special attacks.

tools.label: Tools
tools.description: Melee attack tools (body parts used as weapons) for this mutant.

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs automatically granted to this mutant pawn.

abilityWhitelist.label: Ability whitelist
abilityWhitelist.description: AbilityDefs this mutant is permitted to use from other sources (e.g. genes, implants).

passive.label: Passive
passive.description: If true, this mutant will not attack unless directly provoked.

canBeDrafted.label: Can be drafted
canBeDrafted.description: If true, this mutant can be drafted for combat by the player.

canAttackWhileCrawling.label: Can attack while crawling
canAttackWhileCrawling.description: If true, this mutant can make melee attacks while downed and crawling.

deathOnDownedChance.label: Death on downed chance
deathOnDownedChance.description: Probability (0-1) that this mutant dies when downed instead of going into a downed state. -1 disables this mechanic.

killedLeavings.label: Killed leavings
killedLeavings.description: Items spawned when this mutant is killed.

psychicShockUntargetable.label: Psychic shock untargetable
psychicShockUntargetable.description: If true, this mutant cannot be targeted by psychic shock abilities.

disableHostilityResponse.label: Disable hostility response
disableHostilityResponse.description: If true, this mutant will not automatically retaliate when attacked.

defaultFaction.label: Default faction
defaultFaction.description: FactionDef this mutant belongs to by default when spawned without an explicit faction.

isConsideredCorpse.label: Is considered corpse
isConsideredCorpse.description: If true, this mutant is treated as a reanimated corpse for mechanics that check corpse status.

relativeTurnedThought.label: Relative turned thought
relativeTurnedThought.description: ThoughtDef given to colonists who have a relative transformed into this mutant form.

incapableOfSocialInteractions.label: Incapable of social interactions
incapableOfSocialInteractions.description: If true, this mutant cannot participate in social interactions.

tameable.label: Tameable
tameable.description: If true, this mutant can be tamed by a colonist with the Animals work type.

canBeCapturedToHoldingPlatform.label: Can be captured to holding platform
canBeCapturedToHoldingPlatform.description: If true, this mutant can be captured and placed on an entity holding platform.

producesBioferrite.label: Produces bioferrite
producesBioferrite.description: If true, this mutant passively produces bioferrite when held on a holding platform.

anomalyKnowledgeOffset.label: Anomaly knowledge offset
anomalyKnowledgeOffset.description: Amount of anomaly knowledge awarded when this mutant is studied or captured.

knowledgeCategory.label: Knowledge category
knowledgeCategory.description: KnowledgeCategoryDef determining which anomaly knowledge track this mutant contributes to.

newMutant.label: New mutant
newMutant.description: Minimal MutantDef template with required identification fields.
